title: Christmas Snow Globe,Gingerbread Man Musical Snow Globe Lantern Lights with 6H Timer Battery & USB Powered, Retro Style Holiday Glitter Globe for Xmas Home Decoration Holiday Party Gifts
features: Gingerbread Man Snow Globe: Our Christmas Snow Globe features a unique design and vintage antique brass finish that exudes a rich Christmas holiday ambience, with gorgeous Gingerbread Man inside all hand-carved by hand in vibrant, life-like colours. When you switch on the button, the snowflakes in the snow globe will keep falling with the soft light.

6H ON&18H OFF Timing Mode：Christmas lantern snow globe has a timing function. There are three slide switch modes. Switch to ON1, lights on (no music), flashing, timer for on for 6 hours. Switch to ON2, lights on, flashing, timer is on for 6 hours, off for 18 hours, cycle every 24 hours, no need to worry about forgetting to turn off the power.

8 Christmas Songs：When the Christmas music snow globe is switched on ON2, it cycleplays Christmas themed music,Jingle Bells,We Wish You a Merry Christmas,Silent Night,Deck the Halls,Joy to the World, The First Noel,Hark!The Herald Angel Sings and Oh,Christmas Tree. As the music turns on, sparkling snowflakes begin to fall from the rooftops.(No need to worry if there are sequins attached to the walls of the snow globe, they will slowly fall off when the snow globe is powered up and working).

USB-Powered and Battery-Powered：The Christmas light has two powering options for durability and flexibility, it can be powered by 3 AAA batteries (not included) for easy portability, or it can be continuously illuminated using the included USB cable. It is the perfect size for any occasion, so you can place it anywhere you want. The vintage shape design adds a stronger Christmas spirit to your home.

Your Perfect Christmas Decoration: This Gingerbread Man Christmas Snow Globe is made of high end resin, exquisitely compact and well made. Turn on the light decoration, the crystal clear snowflakes keep tumbling in the lantern, creating a warm and lively festive atmosphere. The fine craftsmanship, cute design and gift box make the snow globe lantern perfect as a gift choice and also a great product for home decoration to create a warm and lively festive atmosphere.
